headline: The Trade Desk (TTD) Appoints Sarah Gavin as CMO and EVP
summary: The Trade Desk Inc. (NASDAQ:TTD) is one of the best growth stocks under $30 to buy now. On June 11, The Trade Desk appointed Sarah Gavin as Chief Marketing Officer and Executive Vice President, effective June 15. Based in Bellevue and reporting to CEO Jeff Green, Gavin will oversee the company’s global brand, communications, customer […]
